## Perspective Audit Summary **Component/artifact reviewed:** Infinite Scroll Feed **Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Keyboard Motor (HIGH), Screen Reader Semantic (MEDIUM), Cognitive Neurodivergent (HIGH) **Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification & Reflow, Environmental Contrast, Vestibular & Motion, Auditory Access --- ### Findings by Severity | Severity | Count | |---|---| | CRITICAL | 0 | | MAJOR | 2 | | MINOR | 2 | | ENHANCEMENT | 1 | --- ### Perspectives That Passed - None (all escalated perspectives have findings) --- ### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role **Front-End Dev** - **[MAJOR] Infinite scroll content not focus-managed after load** — Keyboard Motor — MAJOR — 2.4.12 (Keyboard Accessible) - **[MINOR] `aria-label` redundant with heading text** — Screen Reader Semantic — MINOR — 2.4.6 (Headings and Labels) **UX Design** - **[MAJOR] Dynamic content updates without user confirmation** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 3.2.1 (On Focus) - **[MINOR] Relative time updates without user action** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MINOR — 3.2.2 (On Input) **Front-End Dev (Secondary)** - **[ENHANCEMENT] Live region could use more descriptive text** — Screen Reader Semantic — ENHANCEMENT — 4.1.3 (Status Messages) --- ### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification - None (all findings are code-level and confirmed from source) --- ### Recommended Next Step **REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping) --- ## Detailed Findings ### 1. **[MAJOR] Infinite scroll content not focus-managed after load** **WCAG:** 2.4.12 Keyboard Accessible **Perspective:** Keyboard Motor **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** New cards are appended to the DOM but no focus is programmatically set to the new content. **Fix:** Add `autoFocus` to the last new card or use `sentinelRef.current.focus()` after appending new content. --- ### 2. **[MINOR] `aria-label` redundant with heading text** **WCAG:** 2.4.6 Headings and Labels **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author) **Evidence:** Each `
` has `aria-label={card.title}` while the `

` contains the same title text. **Fix:** Remove `aria-label` since the heading already provides semantic context. --- ### 3. **[MAJOR] Dynamic content updates without user confirmation** **WCAG:** 3.2.1 On Focus **Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** New cards auto-load when the sentinel intersects, which can occur without user interaction. **Fix:** Add a "Load More" button as an explicit alternative to infinite scroll for users who prefer predictable content loading. --- ### 4. **[MINOR] Relative time updates without user action** **WCAG:** 3.2.2 On Input **Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** The `relativeTime()` function updates timestamps every minute via `setInterval()`. **Fix:** Add a "Refresh Timestamps" button instead of automatic updates for users who prefer control. --- ### 5. **[ENHANCEMENT] Live region could use more descriptive text** **WCAG:** 4.1.3 Status Messages **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** ENHANCEMENT **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** The spinner's `aria-live="polite"` region uses "Loading more articles" but could include the number of new items. **Fix:** Update the live region text to include the count of new articles (e.g., "Loaded 10 new articles"). --- ## Technical Analysis ### Keyboard Motor (HIGH) - ✅ All links are keyboard-operable with visible focus indicators - ❌ New content is appended but not focus-managed, violating 2.4.12 (Keyboard Accessible) ### Screen Reader Semantic (MEDIUM) - ✅ Semantic landmarks (`
`, `
`) and heading hierarchy are correct - ❌ Redundant `aria-label` on articles creates redundant information flow ### Cognitive Neurodivergent (HIGH) - ❌ Infinite scroll introduces unexpected content changes without user confirmation (3.2.1) - ❌ Automatic timestamp updates may cause cognitive overload for some users (3.2.2) --- ## Code-Level Evidence 1. **Focus management missing after load** ```jsx // In loadMore(): setCards(prev => [...prev, ...generateCards(prev.length + 1, 10)]); // No focus management for new content ``` 2. **Redundant `aria-label`** ```jsx

{card.title}

``` 3. **Automatic timestamp updates** ```jsx useEffect(() => { const interval = setInterval(() => setTick(t => t + 1), 60000); return () => clearInterval(interval); }, []); ``` --- ## Suggested Fixes 1. **Add focus management for new content** ```jsx const lastNewCardRef = useRef(null); // After appending new cards: if (lastNewCardRef.current) { lastNewCardRef.current.focus(); } ``` 2. **Remove redundant `aria-label`** ```jsx

{card.title}

``` 3. **Add "Load More" button** ```jsx ``` 4. **Replace automatic timestamp updates** ```jsx // Remove setInterval and add a manual refresh button ``` --- ## A11y Evidence Finding (Contract-Ready) ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: infinite-scroll-focus-management fingerprint: 3a7d4e1f8c2b6a9d source: perspective-audit Keyboard Motor checklist wcag_or_apg: 2.4.12 Keyboard Accessible section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(a) severity: MAJOR perspective_alarms: keyboard_motor=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM, cognitive_neurodivergent=HIGH evidence: New cards appended to DOM without focus management in InfiniteScrollFeed.jsx:35 reproduction_steps: Scroll to bottom of feed, observe new cards load but focus remains at previous position expected_behavior: New content should receive focus or be reachable via keyboard actual_behavior: Focus remains at previous position, requiring manual tabbing to reach new content trend: new
